---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Mission Control
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

How do you think this should work?

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Scope

Does this belong in:
- [ ] **Free core** — benefits all users
- [ ] **Pro Single** — advanced solo user feature
- [ ] **Pro Team** — team/enterprise feature
- [ ] **Plugin** — should be a separate plugin
- [ ] **Not sure** — needs discussion

## Additional Context

Mockups, screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
